test datasets with multiple export formats and an

igned a data request workflow enabling clients to submit, save, share, and track requests for flight

Designed and developed the full-stack E-Sequence application for managing flight test procedures

Tested the Hydraulic Load System Design Tool: validated actuator configuration workflows,
engineering calculations, build sheet generation, role-based access control, CRUD operations, and
end-to-end load system design validation.
